title: Penguin Madness
description: A mod adding Bossfights weapons and more!
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c804fc2436529c6b377cde841181aea03cc47961_0.webp)

 A mod made by PenguNein
 Dive into the chaos of Penguin Madness, a Minecraft mod that adds thrilling new combat mechanics and challenges. One of this mod features is the powerful Prime Cultist, a mysterious and deadly pillager boss. Summon this formidable foe by breaking a Prime Cage, and prepare for an intense battle.
  
 Defeat the Prime Cultist to earn the Prime Blade, a legendary weapon that grants players the ability to dash.
  
 
 Will you rise to the challenge and conquer the bosses of Penguin Madness, or will madness consume you?
